action: If the conv_id list is not empty, attempt to fetch the 7 pre-generated videos linked to each conv_id, including the avatars assigned to each video.
fallback_action: Action cannot proceed unless valid conv_id entries are available. Await new conv_id entries and re-attempt this action as soon as they are present.

recipe.steps: Check if the conv_id list from previous results is not empty.
For each conv_id found, retrieve 7 pre-generated videos and any avatars (IDs or metadata) assigned to those videos using the relevant internal storage or querying tools.
